title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: A video demonstration of Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model across eight practical workflows including multimodal vision, video understanding, contract analysis, code generation, voice transcription, error debugging, OCR, and workspace automation. The creator claims Flash now rivals Pro tier performance at lower cost.
